assessor_raw: Dense embeddings vs. BM25 for support retrieval: well-designed with appropriate temporal split, strict label quality, hard negative mining, and equal tuning. NDCG@5 reflects the 5-result deployment scenario. Secondary metrics (popularity correlation, coverage, per-area analysis, temporal drift) are comprehensive. Test set policy is rigorous (one pass, bootstrap CIs). Scope appropriately bounded to same support environment. Verdict: defense_wins.
